result.stderr:
Syncer 1.0.2
Copyright (C) 2026 Microsoft
USAGE:

Following command will update all Test-cases present in TRX and also updates all
Test-Suites having same Test-cases:
  syncer update --account namurako --file c:\users\abc.trx --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie

Following command will just update Test-cases present in specified Test-Suites.
It will not update Test-cases which are not part of specified Test-Suites even
though if Test Results for those Test-Cases are present in TRX file:
  syncer update --account namurako --file c:\users\abc.trx --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie --testsuiteids 1
  2

Following command will update all Test-Cases present in TRX and will only
consider specified Test-Suite Ids in-case of duplicate Test-Cases:
  syncer update --account namurako -c --file c:\users\abc.trx --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie --testsuiteids 1
  2

Following command will update all Test-cases present in JSON:
  syncer update --account namurako --file c:\users\abc.json --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie

Following command will update all Test-cases present in Excel file of type
.xlsx:
  syncer update --account namurako --file c:\users\abc.xlsx --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie

Following command will update all Test-cases present in Excel file of type .xls:
  syncer update --account namurako --file c:\users\abc.xls --project
  ResultsUpdater --token ds2f3m35a56s7i78l8w8efksjdcbsklfhwuie

  -f, --file        Required. File Path

  --testsuiteids    Test Suite Ids. Use this argument to specify particular
                    Test-Suites

  -c                (Default: false) true/false. Use this argument to specify
                    that specified Test-suite Ids should only be considered for
                    duplicate Test-cases

  -a, --account     Required. Azure DevOps Account / Organization

  -p, --project     Required. Azure DevOps Project

  -t, --token       Required. Azure DevOps PAT (Token)

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
